text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. Two important tasks in this field are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition allows a computer to identify what is in a picture, such as a cat or a tree. Object detection goes further by locating specific objects within an image, like finding all the cars in a photo. These technologies have many useful applications. For example, self-driving cars use computer vision to detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles, helping them to navigate safely.
